---
title: ""
page-layout: article
---

## To live a dignified life.

This has been my life motto for so long. I am on a mission to achieve that vision, for me and for everyone around.

My name is Risyad, I am a medical doctor (sort of) who happen to be outside of medicine for quite a while (and enjoyed it somehow.) Nice to see you who happen to stumble across my site. I really appreciate it.
